complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.本节说明两种自动编程模式，以及上传 CAD/元件信息文件后的字段映射与坐标对齐流: This section covers the two Auto-Programming modes, plus field mapping and coordinate alignment after uploading a CAD / component-info file.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.向导的前四步（基本信息、将PCB放置在传送带上、获取尺寸、拍摄）在 :ref:`: The first four wizard steps (Basic Info, Place PCB on Conveyor, Get Dimensions, Capture) are documented in :ref:`创建产品`. This page focuses on the fifth step: running Auto-Programming or uploading CAD.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**全自动编程（无 CAD）** — 完全依赖视觉 + AI 自动识别、分割与建: **Full Auto-Programming (no CAD)** — relies entirely on vision + AI to detect, segment, and model every component and generate the initial inspection boxes.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**半自动编程（上传 CAD）** — 在视觉预测结果的基础上，将 CAD 行记: **Semi-Auto Programming (with CAD)** — on top of the vision results, automatically matches CAD rows to detected components, fills in designator / package / part number, and supports grouping by package or PN.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.上传 CAD 不影响自动编程的速度与基础质量；它提供\"结构化属性 + 分组\": Uploading CAD does not affect Auto-Programming speed or baseline quality; it adds *structured attributes + grouping*, letting the dataset accumulate same-class samples faster during later training / feedback, so stable performance is reached sooner.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.无 CAD 情况下仍可在后续通过手动补录和检测反馈机制逐渐丰富数据集。: Without CAD, the dataset can still be enriched gradually through manual entry and inspection feedback later on.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.完成完整拍摄后，向导进入第五步 **添加CAD (可选)**。此步骤有三个选项：: Once the full capture is complete, the wizard advances to step 5 — **Add CAD (Optional)**. The step offers three actions:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**返回全景采集** — 返回上一步重新拍摄。: **Back to Full Capture** — return to the previous step to re-shoot.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**手动编程** — 跳过自动编程，直接进入产品编程界面。: **Manual Programming** — skip Auto-Programming and go straight to the product programming page.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**运行自动编程** — 在未上传 CAD 文件时，点击此按钮执行全自动编程。: **Run Auto-Programming** — with no CAD uploaded, this button runs Full Auto-Programming.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.若已上传 CAD 文件，则显示 **运行自动编程** 按钮，点击后执行半自动编程: Once a CAD file is uploaded, the same **Run Auto-Programming** button runs Semi-Auto Programming.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.在运行自动编程之前，需要在完整拍摄图像上定义检测区域。: Before running Auto-Programming, define the inspection region on the full-capture image.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**设置矩形检测区域** — 在拍摄图像上拖动框选矩形范围。: **Rectangular inspection region** — drag on the capture to box a rectangular area.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**设置多边形检测区域** — 在拍摄图像上 **按顺时针方向** 依次点击多个: **Polygonal inspection region** — click successive vertices on the capture **clockwise**, then **double-click** to close the polygon.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.检测区域决定了自动编程 AI 识别和生成检测框的范围。区域必须在运行自动编程前完: The inspection region scopes where Auto-Programming's AI looks and generates inspection boxes. It must be defined before Auto-Programming runs — otherwise the system blocks with an error.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.未上传任何文件时，点击 **运行自动编程** 即可开始纯视觉检测编程：: With no file uploaded, click **Run Auto-Programming** to start vision-only programming:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.上传 CAD 文件界面（未上传时点击运行自动编程）: Upload-CAD screen (click *Run Auto-Programming* with no file uploaded)
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.系统会基于 **基本信息** 步骤中定义的自动编程检测类型，自动识别并分割所选类: The system uses the Auto-Programming inspection types defined in the **Basic Info** step to detect and segment matching components, then generates the initial inspection boxes.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.自动编程约需 30 秒完成。是否提供 CAD 文件不影响编程质量。: Auto-Programming takes about 30 seconds. Providing a CAD file does not affect the programming quality.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.完成后会进入产品编程界面，从这一步开始，需要定义对齐标记、确认检测框、微调参数，: When it finishes, the wizard hands off to the product programming page; from there you define alignment marks, verify inspection boxes, and tune parameters. Those steps are covered in the following chapters.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.支持导入 SMT 机台导出的标准元件信息文件（`.csv`、`.tsv`、`.t: Standard component-info files exported by SMT machines are supported (`.csv`, `.tsv`, `.txt`). The file must be UTF-8 encoded.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.可以包含以下字段：: The file may contain the following fields:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.自动匹配并写入标识 / 封装 / 料号，避免后期逐个补录。: Auto-matches and writes Designator / Package / Part Number — no per-component entry later.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.按封装 / 料号即时分组，初始数据集中\"同一类\"样本数量有效放大。: Immediate package / part-number grouping multiplies the same-class sample count in the initial dataset.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.更早形成可复用的封装级统计（缺陷、尺寸、阈值分布），降低后续参数微调成本。: Reusable package-level statistics (defect, size, threshold distributions) form sooner, reducing later parameter-tuning effort.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.协助发现坐标 / 单位 / 重复记录等 CAD 异常。: Helps surface CAD anomalies — bad coordinates, wrong units, duplicate rows.
On the **Add CAD (Optional)** step, click **Select File** to upload a `.csv` (or `.tsv` / `.txt`) file.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**步骤二：解析文件与字段映射**: **Step 2: Parse the file and map fields**
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.文件上传成功后，进入 **解析文件** 界面。左侧显示文件原始内容，右侧为解析与: Once uploaded, the wizard advances to the **Parse File** screen. The raw file is shown on the left; parsing and field mapping happen on the right.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**第一行索引 / 最后一行索引** — 指定 CSV 数据的起始行号和结束行号: **First Row Index / Last Row Index** — the start and end row numbers of the CSV data (1-based).
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**忽略底层** — 若仅检测正面（顶层），开启此开关后须填写底层标识符（如 `: **Ignore Bottom Side** — when inspecting only the top side, enable the switch and supply the bottom-side identifier (such as `B` or `BOT`) so the system filters out bottom-side rows.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.点击 **预览表格** — 系统按当前设置解析并显示表格内容，每列顶部显示一个下: Click **Preview Table** — the system parses the file with the current settings and displays the table; each column header shows a drop-down.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.在 **映射数据** 区域，为每一列在下拉菜单中指定对应的字段类型：: In the **Map Data** area, assign each column to its field type via the drop-down:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**封装号** — 对应 CAD 中的封装名称（Package）。: **Package** — maps to the CAD package name.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**料号** — 对应 CAD 中的料号（Part No.，可选）。: **Part Number** — maps to the CAD part number (optional).
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**中心X坐标** / **中心Y坐标** — X/Y 坐标列（必选）。: **Center X / Center Y** — the X / Y coordinate columns (required).
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**层** — 面别标识列（如已启用忽略底层，需指定此列）。: **Layer** — the side-identifier column (required if *Ignore Bottom Side* is on).
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**忽略此列** — 对不需要的列选择此项。: **Ignore this column** — for columns you don't need.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**坐标单位** — 在\"坐标单位\"下拉菜单中选择 **毫米** 或 **密: **Coordinate Unit** — choose **mm** or **mil** in the *Coordinate Unit* drop-down; it must match the CAD file.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.若运行后提示坐标偏差过大，首先检查坐标单位（mil ↔ mm）是否选择正确。: If the run reports a large coordinate deviation, first check that the coordinate unit (mil ↔ mm) is correct.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**使用元件模板**（可选）— 勾选 **使用元件模板** 后，系统会对匹配到已: **Use Component Templates** (optional) — when checked, CAD entries that match a saved component template use the template's region instead of the AI-detected region. Effective only after the CAD coordinates are aligned.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.字段映射完成后，点击 **运行自动编程**：: Once field mapping is done, click **Run Auto-Programming**:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.系统结合视觉检测结果和 CAD 坐标，自动匹配每个元件并写入标识 / 封装 /: The system fuses the vision results with the CAD coordinates, auto-matches each component, and writes designator / package / part number.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.若自动匹配成功，约 30 秒后进入产品编程界面：: On successful match, after about 30 seconds the wizard hands off to the product programming page:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.同类封装的元件会自动分组，方便后续批量调整与训练。更多详情请参见 :ref:`料: Components sharing the same package are grouped automatically so they can be batch-adjusted and trained later; see :ref:`料号封装和分组` for details.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.若 CAD 坐标与视觉识别结果偏差过大，系统会在匹配失败后自动跳转至 **对齐坐: If the CAD coordinates and the vision results diverge too far, the system falls through to the **Align Coordinates** screen after the match fails:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.在该界面可使用以下工具手动调整对齐：: Use the following tools to align manually:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**平移（X / Y 方向）** — 拖动滑条或输入偏移量。: **Translate (X / Y)** — drag the slider or type an offset.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**旋转** — 输入角度（度）顺时针或逆时针旋转。: **Rotate** — enter an angle (degrees) to rotate clockwise or counter-clockwise.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**水平翻转 / 垂直翻转** — 按钮切换镜像方向。: **Flip horizontal / Flip vertical** — buttons that mirror the layout.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.大致对齐后，点击 **重新分析** 重新执行匹配。: Once roughly aligned, click **Re-analyze** to rerun the match.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.在 **基本信息** 步骤中，可配置自动编程时的 **健康检查** 选项（在运行: The **Basic Info** step exposes Auto-Programming **health-check** options that take effect before Auto-Programming runs:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**数量检查** — 校验每个元件具有期望数量的焊点及 IC 引脚。有 CAD: **Count check** — verifies that each component has the expected number of solder joints and IC leads. When CAD package info is available, lead counts are matched per package.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**质量检查** — 校验焊点对称性、IC 引脚一致性及排阻引脚覆盖率。: **Quality check** — verifies solder-joint symmetry, IC lead consistency, and resistor-array lead coverage.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.两项检查的系统默认值由站点配置决定，可在 **基本信息** 步骤中手动调整。: Both check defaults come from the site configuration; override them in the **Basic Info** step.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**CAD 导入后自动对齐失败**：进入坐标对齐界面，使用平移、旋转、翻转工具大: **Auto-alignment fails after CAD import**: open the coordinate-alignment screen, roughly align with Translate / Rotate / Flip, then click **Re-analyze**.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**坐标点位错乱无法对齐**：检查坐标单位（mil ↔ mm），确认选择与 CA: **Coordinates won't line up at all**: check the coordinate unit (mil ↔ mm) matches the CAD file.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**全自动漏检少量极小器件**：手动补录并训练，或优化光照 / 清晰度后再次运行: **Full Auto-Programming misses a few very small components**: add them manually and retrain, or improve lighting / sharpness and rerun Auto-Programming.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**文件上传失败 / 乱码**：当前不支持 ``.xls`` 文件，需转换为 `: **Upload fails / garbled characters**: ``.xls`` is not supported — convert to ``.csv`` (UTF-8). When saving from Excel, pick **CSV UTF-8 (Comma delimited)**, not the regular CSV format.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**特殊字符（如 ± 符号）解析失败**：将文件中的非标准字符替换为标准 ASC: **Special characters (e.g. ±) fail to parse**: replace non-standard characters with plain ASCII (for example ``±`` → ``+/-``) and retry.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**CAD 自动编程时小区域元件漏识别**：自动编程完成后请手动检查并补录漏识别: **Small-area components missed during CAD Auto-Programming**: review and add missing components manually after the run. For next time, consider supplying a more complete CAD file to narrow the auto-detection scope.

complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.本章介绍 PCB 拼板功能，包括管理子板模板、拼板列表管理、手动生成拼板、自动检: This chapter covers the PCB Array (panel) feature — managing sub-board templates, the panel list, manual array generation, auto-detect and auto-adjust, and NG sub-board marking.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.在产品编程页面顶部点击 **PCB 拼板** 标签页，进入拼板管理界面。: On the product programming page, click the **PCB Array** tab at the top to open the panel management view.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.界面左侧为功能标签页，包含三个标签：: Three sub-tabs sit on the left:
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**管理子板模板** — 定义拼板基础单元的选择区域（Selection ROI: **Manage Base Panel** — define the **Selection ROI** that bounds a base sub-board template, with optional auto-detect for sibling sub-board positions.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**拼板列表** — 查看与管理已注册的各子板模板及其所有子板实例。: **Panel List** — view and manage every registered base-panel template and its sub-board instances.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**手动生成拼板** — 通过标记点辅助手动指定子板排列（高级功能）。: **Manual Panel Generation** — marker-pair-assisted manual sub-board layout (advanced feature).
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**管理子板模板** 标签页用于定义子板的选择区域（Selection ROI）: The **Manage Base Panel** sub-tab defines a sub-board's Selection ROI. The Selection ROI decides which components belong to the sub-board and is the foundation of the Array feature.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**绘制矩形或多边形区域以创建拼板单元模板，选择所有相关元件，然后使用\"自动识: **Draw a rectangle or polygon to create the base-panel template that selects every related component, then use *Auto-Detect* to find the remaining sub-boards and *Auto-Adjust Panel* to align the component boxes.**
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.点击 **矩形** 按钮，在右侧画布上框选第一个子板所在的区域；或点击 **多边: Click **Rectangle** and box the area covering the first sub-board on the right-hand canvas, or click **Polygon** and draw a polygon on the scene (left-click adds a vertex, right-click removes the last vertex, double-click finishes).
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.管理子板模板标签页：拼板单元矩形 / 多边形绘制工具与已定义子板列表: Manage Base Panel sub-tab: rectangle / polygon drawing tools and the list of defined sub-boards.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.绘制完成后，系统弹出对话框 **请输入子版模版标签**，输入该子板模板的名称（默: After drawing, the **Enter Sub-Board Template Label** dialog opens. Type the template name (default ``b0``) and click **Confirm** to save.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.新定义的子板模板出现在 **已定义的子板** 列表中，显示标签名称与 **实例*: The newly-defined template appears in the **Defined Sub-Boards** list with its label and **instance** count.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**已定义的子板** 列表中，每个条目旁有 **手动生成拼板** 按钮，点击后切: Each row in **Defined Sub-Boards** carries a **Manual Panel Generation** button that switches to the **Manual Panel Generation** sub-tab for further work on that template.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.当至少存在一个已定义的子板模板后，页面下方显示 **自动检测** 按钮：: Once at least one base-panel template exists, the **Auto-Detect** button appears at the bottom of the page:
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.点击 **自动检测** 按钮，展开配置区域。: Click **Auto-Detect** to expand the configuration area.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.调整 **接受度** 滑块（0–100，默认 70），数值越高表示匹配精度要求越: Move the **Acceptance** slider (0–100, default 70); higher values demand stricter matching.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.点击 **预览** 查看检测到的子板位置预览效果。: Click **Preview** to see the detected sub-board positions.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.预览满意后，点击 **保存** 完成自动检测并注册所有检测到的子板位置；点击 *: When the preview looks right, click **Save** to register every detected position; click **Cancel** to discard.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**拼板列表** 标签页展示所有已注册的子板模板及其下属子板实例，支持对各子板进: The **Panel List** sub-tab shows every registered base-panel template and its sub-board instances, with management actions per row. The sub-tab is enabled only when at least one sub-board exists.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.界面以树形结构显示：每个 **子板模板（BasePanelRow）** 下列出其: The list is a tree: each **Base Panel Row** carries its sub-board instances underneath.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.每个子板模板行显示标签名称与实例数量，提供以下操作：: Each base-panel row shows the template label and the instance count and exposes:
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**复制** — 在当前模板下新增一个子板实例（位置偏移约 15 像素）。: **Duplicate** — add a sub-board instance under the same template (offset by about 15 pixels).
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**手动生成拼板** — 切换至 **手动生成拼板** 标签页，对该模板进行手动: **Manual Panel Generation** — switch to the **Manual Panel Generation** sub-tab for hand-tuned sub-board layout.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**···（菜单）** — 展开下拉菜单，选择 **删除** 可移除该子板模板及: **··· (menu)** — opens a drop-down; **Delete** removes the template and every sub-board under it.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.每个子板实例行显示该子板的标签名称（如 ``b0-1``）。若子板已标记为 NG: Each row shows the sub-board's label (such as ``b0-1``). When the sub-board is marked NG, the label turns red and is suffixed with ``(NG)``. Actions:
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**铅笔图标** — 点击可内联编辑该子板的标签名称，编辑完成后按 Enter: **Pencil icon** — click to edit the sub-board label inline; press Enter or click **Save** to commit.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**标记为NG** / **取消NG标记** — 将该子板标记或取消标记为废板。: **Mark as NG / Clear NG mark** — mark or unmark the sub-board as wasted. Marking it NG sets NG status on every component within.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.拼板列表标签页：子板树形结构与 NG 标记入口: Panel List sub-tab: sub-board tree and the NG marking entry point
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.底部提供 **+ 添加子板模板** 按钮，点击后跳回 **管理子板模板** 标签: The **+ Add Base Panel** button at the bottom jumps back to **Manage Base Panel** to create another template.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.界面左侧底部的 **自动调整拼板** 按钮对已注册的所有子板执行图像对齐校正：: The **Auto-Adjust Panel** button at the bottom-left runs image-alignment correction on every registered sub-board:
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.系统对每个子板实例的元件框进行图像对齐，重新估算各子板的变换参数。: The system image-aligns each sub-board's components and re-estimates the per-sub-board transform.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.调整完成后，各子板的元件框会更新为校正后的位置（同步状态被设为独立，即后续对基础: After adjustment, each sub-board's component boxes are updated to the corrected positions; sync state flips to independent, so later edits on the base sub-board no longer auto-propagate to the corrected sub-boards.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.默认情况下，所有子板的检测参数（如 ROI、阈值、检测项）均继承基础子板的设置。: By default, every sub-board inherits the base sub-board's inspection parameters — ROIs, thresholds, inspection items.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.（默认开启）开启时，对基础子板的调整会同步到同一模板下的所有子板实例。: (On by default) When on, edits to the base sub-board propagate to every sibling instance under the same template.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.关闭后，可对每个子板单独调整该元件的 ROI，适用于局部差异或特殊需求。: When off, you can tune each sub-board's ROI independently — useful for local variation or special cases.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.数据管理：数据集自动按元件分组，统计所有子板的检测结果。: Data management: the dataset is automatically grouped by component and aggregates results across every sub-board.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.支持在拼板场景下识别每个子板的序列号、批次号等条码信息。: In panel mode, each sub-board's serial number, batch number, and other barcode data can be read independently.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.在模板编辑器中，先为基础子板添加条形码检测框，并分组为新元件。: In the Template Editor, add a barcode ROI to the base sub-board and group it as a new component.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.创建拼板后，系统会自动将该条形码检测框复制到所有子板。: Once the panel is created, the barcode ROI is copied automatically to every sub-board.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.检测时，系统可分别识别每个子板上的条码内容，并自动作为序列号归档。: At inspection time, each sub-board's barcode is read separately and archived as that sub-board's serial number.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.应用场景：追溯生产批次、定位异常子板、自动分组统计。: Use cases: production-batch traceability, isolating an abnormal sub-board, and automatic per-sub-board statistics.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.可在系统配置中为拼板设置整体判废板阈值。参考 :ref:`系统JSON配置`，编: Configure the overall wasted-board threshold for arrays in the system configuration. See :ref:`系统JSON配置`, edit ``wasted_array_board_failure_ratio``, and save.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.检测过程中，若任一子板的元件 NG 率超过该阈值，则该子板会被判定为废板并报出。: During inspection, any sub-board whose component NG ratio exceeds this threshold is judged wasted and reported.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**元件配置（ComponentInfo）** 面板提供 **跳过此元件的检测*: The **Component Info** panel exposes a **Skip inspection on this component** switch. When on, the component is skipped entirely at inspection time — no inference, no result, not counted in ``failure_ratio`` (including the sub-board verdict logic).
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.适用场景：操作员临时排除已知有问题的元件，或排除当前没必要检测的元件。: Use cases: temporarily excluding a component known to be problematic, or excluding a component that doesn't need inspection right now.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.拼板行为：跳过设置会自动传播到 **同一元件在所有子板上的副本**。无需在每个子: Panel behavior: the skip setting propagates automatically to **every sub-board copy of the same component**. No need to repeat it per sub-board.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.与坏板标记互斥：若元件已设置为 **坏板标记元件**，跳过开关会被锁定为关闭、不: Mutually exclusive with badmark: if the component is configured as a **badmark component**, the Skip switch is locked off. Clear the badmark setting first.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.也可在模板编辑器中框选多个元件，使用右键菜单的 **跳过检测 / 清除跳过检测*: You can also region-select multiple components in the Template Editor and use the right-click menu's **Skip inspection / Clear skip inspection** for batch operations.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.判定为跳过的元件在画布上会以 **半透明灰色虚线框** 显示，便于一眼区分。: Skipped components are rendered on the canvas with a **translucent gray dashed outline** so they're easy to spot.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.二维码序列号与拼板关联逻辑: QR-code serial-number assignment in panel mode
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.序列号（MainSN / PanelSN）的生成与赋值规则取决于产品 **是否配: Serial number (MainSN / PanelSN) assignment depends on **whether the product is panelized** and **where the QR-code ROI sits**. The table below covers 5 common scenarios — match your actual configuration against it to verify the MainSN / PanelSN values in the MES report.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.二维码与拼板组合的序列号取值: Serial-number outcomes for QR-code × panel combinations
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.二维码在拼板区域外: QR code outside any panel area
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.二维码在每个拼板内（每个拼板各一个）: One QR code inside each panel
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.任意拼板二维码: Any of the panel QR codes
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.拼板内各有二维码 + 拼板外还有一个: One QR code per panel + one outside
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.拼板外那个二维码: The QR code outside the panels
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**二维码读取失败，序列号变成自动生成值**：检查二维码识别框是否完整覆盖条码区: **QR read fails and the serial number falls back to auto-generated**: check that the QR ROI fully covers the barcode area; that the QR itself is sharp, unobstructed, and unmarred; for panels, if only some sub-boards fail, check whether the panel alignment has drifted.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**MES 报告中 MainSN / PanelSN 不符合预期**：对照上方场: **MES report's MainSN / PanelSN don't match expectations**: match the product configuration against the scenario table above. In scenario ④, MainSN is set to whichever panel's PanelSN happened to be picked. To pin MainSN to a fixed value, add a board-level QR-code ROI outside the panel area so the product falls into scenario ⑤.
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**阴阳板 / 鸳鸯板拼板**: **Mixed-orientation / mirrored panels**: Smart PCB Array does not currently support these layouts; use the legacy **manual copy-paste panel** flow instead (still available).
complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.**阴阳板 / 鸳鸯板拼板**：智能拼板暂不支持此类布局，可使用 **手动复制粘: **Mixed-orientation / mirrored panels**: Smart PCB Array does not currently support these layouts; use the legacy **manual copy-paste panel** flow instead (still available).
